item.title: AL-N10 Essential
item.description:

The AL-N10 Essential is being developed to bring pro features to every gamer. Stay tuned.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: June 10, 2026

int-rock (“we,” “us,” or “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website int-rock.com or contact us regarding our products and services.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Contact Information: Name, email address, company name, and phone number when you submit a contact form or request a quote.
  • Communication Records: Contents of messages you send to us via email or contact forms.
  • Usage Data: Anonymous website analytics including pages viewed, time spent on site, and browser type via standard web analytics tools.

We do not collect payment information or sensitive personal data through this website.

item.title: Terms & Conditions
item.description:
Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: June 10, 2026

Welcome to int-rock. By accessing and using int-rock.com, you agree to be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of this website.

1. Website Use

  • The content on this website is provided for general informational and commercial purposes.
  • You may browse, view, and contact us through the website for legitimate business inquiries.
  • You agree not to use this website for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these terms.

2. Intellectual Property

  • All content on this website — including text, images, product descriptions, logos, and website design — is the exclusive property of int-rock unless otherwise stated.
  • You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content from this website without prior written permission from int-rock.

3. Product Information

  • Product specifications, images, and descriptions on this website are provided for reference. Actual products may vary slightly in appearance or specification.
  • We reserve the right to modify product designs and specifications without prior notice.
  • All product names and model numbers are trademarks or registered trademarks of int-rock.

4. Inquiries and Orders

  • Submitting a contact form or inquiry does not constitute a binding order or contract.
  • All wholesale orders, pricing, and partnerships are subject to separate written agreements.
  • Pricing and availability are subject to change without notice.

5. Limitation of Liability

  • int-rock shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use this website.
  • We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of website content.

6. External Links

  • This website may contain links to external websites (e.g., social media). We are not responsible for the content or practices of third-party sites.
  • Linking to int-rock.com is permitted provided it does not imply endorsement or misrepresent the relationship.

7. Privacy

  • Your use of this website is also governed by our Privacy Policy.
  • We handle all personal information in accordance with applicable data protection regulations.

8. Changes to Terms

  • We reserve the right to modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon posting to this page.
  • Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

9. Governing Law

These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the People’s Republic of China.
